Just now

--

If You Want Me to Trust Your AI Presenter, Start by Telling Me It’s AI
Press enter or click to view image in full size

Dear Solar Battery Companies,
Congratulations.
YouTube has finally convinced itself that I desperately need a solar battery.
Every few minutes, another one of your advertisements interrupts whatever I happen to be watching.
Different company.
Different logo.
Different rebate.
The same smiling presenter.
At first glance they appear perfectly normal.
Then they begin speaking.
The lips move.
The head nods.
The eyes blink occasionally.
Unfortunately, the lips and the voice seem to have entered into a loose working relationship.
The facial expression never changes.
I find myself paying far more attention to the presenter than the battery.
One advertisement begins with a pleasant young lady saying,
“My husband is 45…”
I immediately stop listening.
